category_sources: Official GitHub README describes using rsh, ssh, or sh to run commands on targets in parallel.
source_facts.description says shmux executes the same command on many hosts in parallel.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is shmux/shmux and README uses shmux.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the shmux(1) manual page as detailed documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/shmux/shmux; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README names rsh, ssh, sh, target hosts, scripts, and formatted output.
source_facts.description identifies parallel command execution across hosts.
